title: Simple Falling Autumn Leaves Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this easy simple falling autumn leaves coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Seasonal holidays celebrate cultural traditions, harvest cycles, and historical legends worldwide.
Festive decorations like carved pumpkins and evergreen trees began as ancient cultural markers of season changes.
Coloring holiday scenes is a fun way to prepare for festive family gatherings.
